programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Baal Veer finds himself in a challenging situation, attempting to simultaneously hold up a heavy door and rouse Manav from an unintended sleep.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Dadi narrates the story of an evil witch who abducts children to magically turn them into animals. Soon, the story transforms into reality.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Bhayankar Pari tries to ruin Baal Veer's life. Meanwhile, Baal Veer avoids listening to a horrific story. Later, Touba Touba hatches an evil plan.

programme.desc: Bhayankar Pari makes multiple devices and calls upon all the witches. Meanwhile, the fairies call Baalveer for help in getting Dooba Dooba back to his natural form.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Rohan finds a mysterious sack outside Madhavi and Bhide's house. Later, Rohan informs the Mahila Mandal about the incident.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Excitement spreads through the colony as Bhide distributes jackfruit to everyone, a gift from his uncle's farm. However, the women find themselves puzzled.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gudi Padwa unites Gokuldham Colony in celebration. Soon, the Bhides boost the festive mood by preparing a variety of jackfruit dishes for the auspicious day.

programme.desc: Bhide is taken aback as the tea he was sipping spills onto his clothes. Soon after, he reprimands Goya, who is responsible for the incident.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: All the residents debate about the ideal fine for improper gifts. However, chaos breaks out in the midst of their discussion.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena visits each house in the society with a bowl full of letters that determine the recipient of all members' present.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: All Gokuldham are thinking about what gift they should give to their recipient. Bhide tries to find out about the recipient of Madhavi.

programme.desc: Natu Kaka and Bagha dress as Santa Claus and visit each member's house to collect the secret gifts. The party begins, and everyone is excited to see their gifts.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone is excited to open their gift. Jethalal seems upset after opening his present. Bhide becomes suspicious of Tapu when Sonu gets a heart-shaped cushion with a letter.

programme.desc: Anjali is dissatisfied with her gift, but Taarak urges her to accept it anyway. Meanwhile, Bhide discovers who gave Sonu a gift.

programme.desc: Tapu Sena presents a delightful idea that pleases Anjali and Taarak. Meanwhile, Jethalal receives a pleasant surprise.

programme.desc: The CID team rush out looking for Dr Salunkhe when he is reported missing. On realising who the suspect is, the team is divided into two groups in order to rescue Salunkhe and arrest the culprit.

programme.desc: Chaos ensues when Daya informs the men that they have decided to consult a tantric to get rid of the ghost.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The ladies of Gokuldham Society notice that their beloved maid has started displaying odd behaviour. But they get shocked when they learn that she is moving away.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When their help leaves Gokuldham Society, the ladies try to look for other maids. Meanwhile, they employ their husbands to help them in doing the household chores.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.desc: Anurag and a girl exchange a package with each other at a restaurant, but later, he meets with an accident and dies. Soon, Team CID learn some interesting things after interrogating Anurag's wife.

programme.desc: Ramesh, an old activist against criminals, receives calls of condolence for his own demise. Later, the CID team is called to investigate when Ramesh is found dead with a suicide video note.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: When two bodies are found, the CID team finds distinct traces of blood and sends the samples to the forensic lab. Soon, Dr Salunkhe tests the blood and finds that the samples are different.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: Viren and Rashi go to a hotel for their marriage anniversary, when suddenly Viren starts screaming after seeing a girl. Soon, he asks his wife to leave as the girl he saw was supposed to be dead.

programme.desc: Nitin, a biker, is compelled by Roshni's group to participate in a deadly race. One day before the race, Nitin gets injured and his replacement takes his place but dies when the fuel tank explodes.

programme.desc: Tapu Sena is ready to celebrate the Ganapati Utsav with lots of fun.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: CID

programme.title: CID

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jhilmil and her family arrive at Gokuldham society and visit Popatlal's house to meet him. Later, Jhilmil is shocked when she learns that Popatlal refused to interview Salman Khan.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Yashomati Maiyya Ke Nandlala

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone in Gokuldham feels worried when Abdul prepares to sell his shop and bids farewell during the festival.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and Bapuji wait for Jethalal to drop them off at Bapuji's friend's house, but Jethalal is missing. Tapu asks Sonu to accept a parcel delivery in his absence.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Iyer tries to contact Jethalal to ask about Babita's phone, but Jethalal's phone is taken too. Bhaga comes up with an idea to bring the phones back.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal accidentally answers Iyer on the phone and asks Bagha to talk to him instead. However, Iyer demands to talk to Jethalal and asks him about Babita's phone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal pleads with the goons who have Babita's phone, begging them to return it. They remain resolute in their decision and demand money.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal hides while Bagha talks to Iyer and Babita, but a lizard scares him out of hiding. Iyer accuses Bagha of lying about Jethalal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone in the society criticises Jethalal for his carelessness with Babita's phone. Taarak helps Jethalal arrange a meeting with the debt collectors.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal arranges a meeting with the debt recovery agents, hoping to retrieve Babita's phone. Sodhi prepares to confront the agents to get Babita's phone back.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When Jethalal, Taarak, and Sodhi are arrested, they see that inspector Pandey is on duty, but he refuses to help them.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Inspector Pandey locks up Jethalal, Taarak, and Sodhi in his station, prompting them repeatedly beg him to be lenient with them.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal asks Inspector Pandey to drop off him, Taarak, and Sodhi at the society. Bapuji learns about Jethalal's arrest from Bhide.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal returns Babita's repaired phone, and Jethalal argues about exchanging the expensive shoes that Tapu had ordered.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Sharma family visits Taarak while Daya asks Jethalal to go to his house as soon as possible; Taarak and his friends attend a poetry conference.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents try to convince Jethalal to speak with Gulabo, but he refuses. Finally, Daya convinces him to speak to her.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal receives the court's notice and approaches Taarak. They meet an advocate who looks confident and assures Jethalal that they will win the case.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal reaches the court with his family and the advocate. When Gulabo reaches the court, Jethalal's advocate tries to negotiate the matter with her.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Natu Kaka creates a scene outside court as he thinks that Jethalal would lose the case. Daya and Gulabo get into a heated argument.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Unable to bear the advocate Jwala's allegations, Sodhi gets hyper and reacts aggressively. Jwala shoots a series of questions at Daya who then reveals the truth in the court.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After the lawyer twists her words to fit her narrative in court, Daya gets furious and talks rudely with the advocate, which causes Jethalal in trouble.

programme.desc: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

programme.desc: Popatlal and the ladies try to find the Gokuldham men's secret party. The event is disrupted when Champaklal unexpectedly returns to the society.

programme.desc: The Gokuldham men plan an April Fool's prank on the ladies and Popatlal. The ladies decide to check their husbands' drinks.

programme.desc: Champaklal and the ladies pretend to be intoxicated to prank the men. The Gokuldham men discuss global warming.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finally informs his family about the cancelled London trip and sends them into a frenzy. But they unanimously make a decision that surprises Jethalal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
